title: A Bridge that Leads to an Oasis

text_block_list.text: One day, while I was walking around Tracen…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuwaaaa～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yup, bullseye. I feel like a worm that's 
shriveled up on the side of the road.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Well, we're prepping our new journey: the Twinkle Series, so it can't be helped… Maybe those youngsters will entertain me～
…She was a girl who acted like anywhere under the sky was her home. School life definitely must feel like a cramped cage to her.
A place that's not too far away from here, but also satisfies her desire to travel… Realistically speaking, a place like that doesn't—
A few days later.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah, unfortunately. 
Why, what's up?
choice_data_list: Shall we go on a small journey?
Shall we go on a small journey?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Hm?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh～, this is… that Uma-lator, right? 
It has to be.
choice_data_list: Yup, we're going on a virtual journey today!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …So that's how it is. It'd be impossible to do it in real life so we take it to a fake one. Haha, now that's interesting! Alright, let's give it a whirl!
(Vrrrrrrrr)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Whew. 
Now this is impressive.
choice_data_list: [Is your body okay? Do you have your senses?]

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, a-okay over here. 
But wow…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I really can smells things in here. 
Fresh and sweet, the smell of the earth.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Is this flower a mix of a marguerite and a poppy? 
Either way it's a pretty flower.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Hey! 
Can I walk as much as I'd like?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright! 
I've been waiting to hear those words!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha, the leaves changed colors as soon as I started walking. 
I guess anything goes here.

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Animal
text_block_list.text: Squeek Squeek!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow. There's even animals here too. 
…Hey there, you adorable thing. Pspspsp…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: What an interesting world. It's artificially made, but it doesn't feel artificial. A world that goes as far as one's "imagination".

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …I wonder where the god of this world has journeyed.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
What, it's over already? 
I wanted to be in there for a few more hours.
In the end, Stay Gold had her fill of fun until the hours of operations ceased. Before we knew it, night had come.
choice_data_list: The virtual world was quite fun, no?
The virtual world was quite fun, no?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it really was. I was surprised over and over again. Are there other worlds in there? I want to go there again.

—Well, there's… 
There was one thing I noticed.
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold

text_block_list.text: If memory serves me right… the Uma-lator is only for use in conjunction with training, right?
text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Was that alright? 
Using it for nothing more than entertainment?
choice_data_list: To be honest, we shouldn't have done that.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That so? 
…So, what's the plan now?
choice_data_list: Let's go with a "mental" training approach!

text_block_list.text:
Having said that, I showed her the "Uma-lator Use Form". 
…The after use report could be filled out however it seems.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Pft.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I get it now! 
You really like walking on thin ice!
choice_data_list: I'd wither away if I don't get stimulated.
I'd wither away if I don't get stimulated.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally. 
That's the truth right there.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Welp, time to go write that report. 
So we can tread on that ice again next time, right?
